issue_summary: make sure addIndexes(*) does not corrupt index on disk full; change to transactional semantics; fix IndexWriter.mergeSegments and IndexReader.commit to clean up (and leave instance consistent) on exception
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Commit changes resulting from delete, undeleteAll, or setNorm operations
   * 
   * @throws IOException
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Commit changes resulting from delete, undeleteAll, or
   * setNorm operations
   *
   * If an exception is hit, then either no changes or all
   * changes will have been committed to the index
   * (transactional semantics).
   * 
   * @throws IOException
   */
